2241610.name: VOIDWATCH: CrossLust
2241610.description:
The year is 1989, Brian Kendo is a reckless guy with the weight of his parents on his shoulders. Brian Kendo is unwilling to lie down and allow these mysterious circumstances be his undoing. After being transported to a world that is not his own and forced to confront the horrors of Voideo alone, Brian wonders why he's been placed in such an unfathomable situation.  

The mystery surrounding Brian Kendo and his true purpose; in order for him to unearth the truth, he will need the help of like minded individuals, as Brian meets weird, unthinkable allies in even stranger locations. With the right accomplices on his side, Brian Kendo dives headfirst into unraveling this bizarre mystery in the hopes of establishing his way back home.

Explore the depths of what the "Celestials" call "Voideo", remnants of a bygone age, fight against strange creatures, meet even stranger people (some that may try to kill you), and of course; solve the mystery behind Brian Kendo's purpose in this Sci-Fi Fantasy RPG title made in the RPG Maker VX Ace engine.
2241610.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
